text:
Created attachment 252811
patch for www/rubygem-gollum-rugged_adapter: update to 2.1.0 -> 3.0

Changelog grit_adapter: https://github.com/gollum/grit_adapter/releases/tag/v2.0.0

Changelog gollum lib: https://github.com/gollum/gollum-lib/releases/tag/v6.0

Changelog gollum: https://github.com/gollum/gollum/releases/tag/v6.0.0 & https://github.com/gollum/gollum/releases/tag/v6.0.1

I wasn't sure about the process to delete something but i think rubygem-gollum-grit_adapter10 could be removed now.

I tested the ports with my local installation.
